action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 4 AUC=0.7556, slightly below the best 0.7579 from iter 3. The LSTM architecture seems plateaued around 0.758 despite capacity and regularization tweaks. Analysis: Transformer-based sequence models often outperform LSTM on knowledge tracing by capturing long-range dependencies. I will implement a causal Transformer encoder that separately embeds skills and correctness, adds positional encoding, and conditions predictions on the target skill embedding. Keeping the class name DKT preserves compatibility with train.py and predict.py. Decision: Rewrite model.py with the transformer, update train.py/predict.py accordingly, and do a fast 10-epoch validation run to test the new architecture before scaling up.
